'''Yurb''' was an arid [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Yurb system/Legends|Yurb system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was the homeworld of the [[razor-tailed tiger]] of the [[Dust Pits]].

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{1stm}}
